raw.problem: Rural India lacks specialist diagnostics within reachable distance.
raw.opportunity_size: 600k villages, ~1 doctor per 1,500 people in rural belts.
raw.why_now: Telemedicine rails are now mature enough to extend with robotics.
raw.proof_of_work: Robotic sample-handling kiosk validated in 2 PHCs.
raw.success_scenario: If reimbursement clears, rollout is statewide.

structured.differentiator: Roboticist + public-health physician co-founders; robotic sample-handling kiosk validated in PHCs.
structured.solution: Built a robotic sample-handling kiosk validated in 2 PHCs.
